# B05_ACTION_ITEMS

## Action Items Summary

This was a **presentation/webinar format** (Fundamentals of AI Productivity) rather than a working session with traditional assigned tasks. The action items identified are **follow-up commitments** from presenters to distribute materials to attendees.
